description: The World Ocean Model of Biogeochemistry And Trophic-dynamics (WOMBAT) is the ocean biogeochemistry module added to ACCESS models that use MOM (Modular Ocean Model). The core of WOMBAT is a Nutrient - Phytoplankton - Zooplankton - Detritus (NPZD) framework. The original WOMBAT version was described in Oke et al. (2013). Two current WOMBAT models exist: WOMBAT-lite and WOMBAT-mid. WOMBAT-lite is designed to be a simple and general biogeochemical model of the global ocean that is computationally efficient. WOMBAT-mid is designed to be a more complex and realistic ocean biogeochemical model that is more computationally costly but provides a greater resolution of ecosystem and biogeochemical processes. A more complete description of both models can be found at https://wombat-docs.readthedocs.io/stable/
